cases.title: Single table scope - prefix matches no scope columns, only functions

expected.comment: Scope=[orders]. Single table. CURRENT_TABLE=products not in scope (ignored). Prefix 'p' matches no scope columns. Only functions suggested.

cases.title: Single table scope - prefix matches BOTH column name AND table name

expected.comment: Scope=[products]. Single table. CURRENT_TABLE=orders not in scope (ignored). Prefix 'p' matches column name 'price' AND table name 'products'. Order: unqualified column-name match, qualified column-name match, table-name expansion remaining, functions.

cases.title: Single table scope - CURRENT_TABLE in scope via alias, alias-exact-match

expected.comment: Scope=[items as i]. Single table. CURRENT_TABLE=items in scope via alias 'i'. Prefix 'i' equals alias → alias-exact-match mode. Suggestions in schema order.

cases.title: Single table scope - prefix matches ONLY column name (not table name)

expected.comment: Scope=[orders]. Single table. CURRENT_TABLE=items not in scope (ignored). Prefix 'u' matches ONLY column name 'user_id' (not table name 'orders'). Order: unqualified column-name match, functions.
